# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/), and
this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [Unreleased]

## [v0.2.7] - 2026-06-30

### Added

- Annotated structured extraction blocks with navigation context from EPUB TOC,
  assigning chapter IDs and titles to text blocks

### Changed

- Converted project documentation from RST to Markdown and enabled MyST parser for
  Sphinx builds

<!-- generated by releaseledger -->

## [v0.2.6] - 2026-06-26

### Added

- Sanitized inline XHTML element output in structured extraction with configurable tag
  preservation
- TextFragment model for fine-grained content representation with entity and inline tag
  runs
- Markdown fragment translation from inline XHTML for structured extraction output with
  configurable flavor (CommonMark, GFM)

### Changed

- Extended test coverage for segment extraction with XHTML elements and structured
  output

<!-- generated by releaseledger -->

## [v0.2.5] - 2026-06-22

### Added

- Structured EPUB extraction with TextBlock, TextSegment, TextRun, and InlineTagRun
  models for offset-preserving content analysis
- Source document tracking with byte offset computation and stable block hashing
- Navigation entry extraction with spine-aware HTML content slicing
- ExtractionPolicy configuration for block tags, skip tags, and opaque inline tag
  handling

<!-- generated by releaseledger -->

## [v0.2.4] - 2026-02-04

### Changed

- Minimum Python version raised to 3.10; type annotations modernized to use union syntax
  (X | Y) throughout codebase

<!-- generated by releaseledger -->

## [v0.2.3] - 2026-01-27

### Changed

- phrasplit made optional; sentence and clause formatting features require explicit
  installation via epub2text[sentences] extra

<!-- generated by releaseledger -->

## [v0.2.2] - 2026-01-25

### Added

- Secure URL download with size limits, timeout handling, scheme validation, and EPUB
  format verification
- Bookmark backup and recovery with atomic file writes using temporary files and fsync

### Changed

- Page range parsing now prefers literal page numbers over index-based lookup when
  numeric pages are available
- NCX page list parsing switched from BeautifulSoup to defusedxml for safer XML handling

### Fixed

- Chapter title deduplication now handles punctuation separators and normalized matching
  for heading-like lines
- Range parsing validates that start index is less than or equal to end index

<!-- generated by releaseledger -->

## [v0.2.1] - 2026-01-24

### Changed

- Extracted spine HTML slicing into reusable \_slice_spine_html method in parser
- Refactored CLI to use shared spinner context manager for progress indicators
- Unified range parsing with parse_range_tokens for chapter and page selection,
  preserving input order and deduplicating results

### Fixed

- Bracketed page number removal now only matches standalone lines instead of inline
  occurrences
- Reader line clamping consolidated into \_clamp_line to prevent out-of-range scroll
  positions

<!-- generated by releaseledger -->

## [v0.2.0] - 2026-01-10

### Added

- Sentence splitting with phrasplit integration for improved text formatting
- Page source tracking for content origin metadata
- Interactive terminal reader for browsing EPUB content with chapter navigation and
  bookmark support
- Gutenberg format conversion with chapter detection and structured output

### Changed

- Usage examples and batch processing documentation

<!-- generated by releaseledger -->

## [v0.1.0] - 2025-12-27

### Added

- EPUB text extraction with chapter-level and page-level output
- Command-line interface with chapter range selection, offset/limit filtering, and
  multiple output formats
- Text cleaning pipeline with page number removal, whitespace normalization, and
  sentence formatting
- Metadata extraction for EPUB title, author, language, and publication info

### Changed

- Initial documentation and API reference

<!-- generated by releaseledger -->
